hero.title: Akseptabilidad
hero.lead: Labay na IATF ya simpli, mainomay ya basaen, na-access panamegley na keyboard, tan na-compatible ed saray ontulong a teknolohiya so sayan website.
support: Parad Web accessibility, uusaren na IATF [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Say praktikal ya iyaplika et base met ed direktan eksperiensya na saray manguusar na ontulong iran teknolohiya.

paragraphs: No walay naromog mon problema ed sayan website, ipangasin ireport itan panamegley na e-mail:
Kaibad saray makatulong a report so:
items: say pahina no iner agawa so isyu
no anton tulong a teknolohiya, browser, odino gadyet so inusar mo, no wala
report.footnote: Agmo la kaukolan ya isulat so pormal ya report ed bug. Magenap labat so malinew ya deskripsion.

paragraphs: Saray isyu ed inkapangasabi so nayarin sumaryoen ed matukoy a publikon reperytoryo ta pian naayos iratan ed lukas.
No say report mo et mangilaktip na pribadon impormasyon, malinew mon ibaga itan ed mensahe.
Sayan site et intensionan melag tan maslak et static. Arum a bersion na lenguahe so nayarin agkompleto legan ya ipaparaan iray patalos.
